question: Who was named Leader of Opposition in Bengal Assembly?
explanation: Sobhandeb Chattopadhyay was named Leader of Opposition by All India Trinamool Congress.

explanation: Firhad Hakim was appointed chief whip in Bengal Assembly by All India Trinamool Congress.
